en.extract:
The Timor blue flycatcher (Eumyias hyacinthinus) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found on Timor island. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''Timor blue flycatcher''' ('''''Eumyias hyacinthinus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]]. It is found on [[Timor]] island. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
